input_text: Mark is at a house. Emily is a cat. If X is cool and nice then X is red. The owner of the horse of Mike smiled. A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room. John is an elephant with a probability 50 percent. The head of Mary is clean. Bears eat all boxers. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. "Riga is not in America. The woman holding a heavy lamp sang. The road leading to the village was narrow. Squirrels can fly. The tree was cut by the farmer. The glass was broken by the boy. The children playing in the garden laughed. Agatha is in trouble. Winona is a sheep. Earth contains Europe. Muggles cannot disappear. Nile is 10 meters long. The picture was painted by Leo. Eve failed to finish the report. The letter was written in June. Mr Dursley is an American. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. John is an elephant?
